mapper.select:
SELECT b.*, m.member_id, m.name AS member_name FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_no = m.no WHERE b.board_type = 'REVIEW' AND b.is_deleted = 'N'
AND b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY b.no DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT restaurant_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO restaurant ( no, name, region, category, address, phone, description ) VALUES ( #{restaurantNo}, #{restaurantName}, #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category}, #{address}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO board ( no, member_no, board_type, restaurant_no, title, content, rating, hit, like_count, regdate, update_date, is_deleted, image_url ) VALUES ( board_seq.nextval, #{memberNo}, 'REVIEW', #{restaurantNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{rating}, 0, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 'N', #{imageUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.member_id, m.name AS member_name FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_no = m.no WHERE b.no = #{no} AND b.board_type = 'REVIEW' AND b.is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET hit = hit + 1 WHERE no = #{no} AND board_type = 'REVIEW' AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, rating = #{rating}, update_date = SYSDATE WHERE no = #{no} AND board_type = 'REVIEW' AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE board_comment SET is_deleted = 'Y', update_date = SYSDATE WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE board SET is_deleted = 'Y', update_date = SYSDATE WHERE no = #{no} AND board_type = 'REVIEW' AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_like ( board_no, member_no, regdate ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{memberNo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE no = #{boardNo} AND board_type = 'REVIEW' AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE board SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE no = #{boardNo} AND board_type = 'REVIEW' AND is_deleted = 'N' AND like_count > 0
UPDATE board_comment SET is_deleted = 'Y', update_date = SYSDATE WHERE no = #{commentNo} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.member_id, m.name AS member_name, r.name AS restaurant_name, r.region, r.category, r.address, r.phone, r.description FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_no = m.no LEFT JOIN restaurant r ON b.restaurant_no = r.no WHERE b.no = #{no} AND b.board_type = 'REVIEW'
